literal_meaning: thinking, thought-direction, initial application of mind
definition: The act of thinking toward or taking up a theme in the mind.
notes: Project preference is thinking because it is plain, readable, and reflects an active mental process without importing technical meditation jargon.

context_rules.context: In project translations of jhāna formulae
In analytical prose where the directional aspect is being highlighted

example_phrases.notes: Common in descriptions of the first jhāna.
